Notice Of Hearing Of Petitioner Progressive Power Group, Inc.S Petition For An Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PROGRESSIVE POWER GROUP, INC.'S Petition For An Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED.
